subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto God Who hath drawn the land and all who dwell therein through the fragrance that wafteth from the region of Hijaz [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی اجتذب البلاد و من فیها من العرف الذی تضوع من شطر الحجاز و به
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @personal instructions
